ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of people vaccinated in the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the country (e.g., high, upper-middle, lower-middle, low) */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination rate */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the rate belongs to */,
  "real_coverage_per_million" REAL /* Real coverage per million people vaccinated */,
  "relative_interest" REAL /* Relative interest in COVID-19 vaccination */,
  "vaccination_rate_per_day" REAL /* Vaccination rate per day */,
  "vaccination_rate_per_week" REAL /* Vaccination rate per week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, health organization, research institution) */,
  "data_update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the import belongs to */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "imported_data" TEXT /* Imported data in JSON format */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, health official, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view data, edit data, admin) */,
  "data_access_level" TEXT /* Level of data access (e.g., global, country-level, region-level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON format */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., vaccination rates, vaccination trends, data imports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_requests_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination trend */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the trend belongs to */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate for the country */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date the trend was recorded */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the center belongs to */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "center_address" TEXT /* Address of the vaccination center */,
  "center_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vaccination center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_centers_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination appointment */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination center the appointment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_appointments_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES vaccination_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_appointments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
